name: autorouter-cli
description: One-command CLI that routes text/audio/video requests to best-value APIs with MPP payments.

scripts.providers: node cli/index.js providers list --type text --source core
scripts.providers:mpp:text: node cli/index.js providers list --type text --source mpp --pricing live
scripts.providers:mpp:audio: node cli/index.js providers list --type audio --source mpp --pricing live
scripts.providers:mpp:video: node cli/index.js providers list --type video --source mpp --pricing live
scripts.models:text: node cli/index.js models list --type text --pricing live --mode cheapest
scripts.models:audio: node cli/index.js models list --type audio --pricing static --mode cheapest
scripts.models:video: node cli/index.js models list --type video --pricing static --mode cheapest
scripts.one:text: node cli/index.js one --type text --source mpp --auto "write a launch tweet"
scripts.one:video: node cli/index.js one --type video --source mpp --auto "make a 6 second teaser" --seconds 6
scripts.text: node cli/index.js run --type text --auto "write a launch tweet" --pricing live --mode cheapest
scripts.audio: node cli/index.js run --type audio --auto "transcribe this call" --pricing static --mode cheapest --seconds 45
scripts.video: node cli/index.js run --type video --auto "make a 6 second teaser" --pricing static --mode cheapest --seconds 6
scripts.release:check: node cli/index.js --help && node cli/index.js one --type text --source mpp --auto "release smoke check" --pricing live --mode balanced --payment simulated --yes
